metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5386
metadata.comment:
Rationale: AP3S1 (AP3-σ3A) was detected in SV biochemical fractions, but not enriched as compared to the P2 fraction.

AP3S1 (AP3-σ3A) and AP3S2 (AP3-σ3A) were also detected in SV biochemical fractions prepared from rat brain that were subjected to sucrose gradients and a series of western blots (PMID:9590176, Fig.4).

This protein is part of the ubiquitous AP3 complex (PMID:9118953, PMID:9151686).. Experimental description: M&M: "Brain Synaptosomes and SV Purifications. Synaptosomes (P2') and SVs were purified from whole brain of 4- to 6-wk-old Sprague-Dawley rats following the same protocols used in ref. 2 and previously described in ref. 34 for SV, and in ref. 4 for P2'."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
